══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tortle — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tortle — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tortle — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 23 damage. Tortle — Unarmored Caster HP: 44/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Tortle — Unarmored Caster HP: 26/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══

ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

══ ROUND 4 ══
